title: Driver
description: A causal factor that shapes ≥1 Problems. Migrated from content/auckland/schema/driver.schema.json. Structural changes: (1) affects → problem_ids (E_causes edge, Driver → Problem); (2) evidence_ids → claim_ids (E_evidenced_by); (3) scope enum added (spatial scale of driver operation); (4) intensity_by_region added (optional per-region intensity scores); (5) theme added. Cross-entity invariant P3 (at least one Driver per Problem) is Layer 1c Python.

timescale.description: Characteristic timescale over which this Driver operates (driver_timescale_v1).

scope.description: Spatial scale at which this Driver primarily operates.

intensity_by_region.description: Optional per-region intensity scores (dimensionless ℝ). Object keys must be valid Region enum values; cross-entity key validation is a Python invariant (JSON Schema cannot enforce enum-valued object keys).

problem_ids.description: Problems this Driver causes. ≥1 required. Materialises to E_causes.

claim_ids.description: Claims supporting this Driver. Materialises to E_evidenced_by.
